rulings.Case Title: RICHARD KARL BACKER VS. PAUL OFFENBACHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion That Plaintiff'S Request For Admission Be Deemed Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 6, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF RICHARD BACKER's Motion That Plaintiff's Request For Admission Be Deemed Admitted GRANTED. Plaintiff declares that he served Defendant Ramer with 99 requests for admissions to which Defendant Ramer has not responded as of the filing of this motion on January 6, 2017. Defendant Ramer did not file an opposition.= (501/REQ)
